svg.title: mcmc_with_pdr11d.py — full pipeline flowchart, dark theme
svg.desc: Dark-background pipeline flowchart matching the DNN MCMC style: surrogate_config at top, left training lane (crm_eval, train_pdr, pdr11d_model.npz), right inference lane (pdr_emulator, log_prob_pdr), MCMC main box, output boxes, legend.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does surrogate_config_11d.py export to the PDR MCMC pipeline?')
g.text: bounds · X_TRUE · Y_SIG · masks · PDR config · SEED

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does crm_eval_11d_six.py do in the PDR pipeline — both for training data and the one-off truth observation?')
sendPrompt('How does train_pdr_11d.py construct the HC multi-index, build the design matrix, and solve via Algorithm 5?')
sendPrompt('What keys are stored in pdr11d_model.npz and how does pdr_emulator_11d load them?')
sendPrompt('How does pdr_emulator_11d.py predict using phi @ C_six with no sqrt(m) correction needed?')
sendPrompt('How does log_prob_pdr11d.py compute the diagonal Gaussian log-likelihood and what is the blob shape?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the complete MCMC loop in mcmc_with_pdr11d.py including the Pool, burn-in, production, timing and all diagnostics')
g.text: R-hat · autocorr · acceptance fraction · timing (total + per-step)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What plots does mcmc_with_pdr11d produce — 11x11 pairwise, trace, ED and JS heatmaps?')
sendPrompt('What variables are stored in the PDR MCMC NetCDF output file?')
sendPrompt('What does the PDR MCMC timing report show for total and per-step computation time?')

svg.text: click any box to explore · dashed = one-off truth call · center line = config exports to mcmc
